original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM("t5"."f2" * "t6"."f1"), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUM(CAST("t5"."EXPR0" * "t6"."f1" AS INTEGER)), 0) END FROM (SELECT "JOB", COALESCE(SUM("SAL"), 0) AS "EXPR0", COUNT(*) AS "f2" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "f1" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME"
rewritten_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM("t5"."f2" * "t6"."f1"), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUM(CAST("t5"."EXPR0" * "t6"."f1" AS INTEGER)), 0) END FROM (SELECT "JOB", COALESCE(SUM("SAL"), 0) AS "EXPR0", COUNT(*) AS "f2" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "f1" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME"
